mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id AS orderItemId, o.order_no AS orderNo, req.title AS requestTitle, oi.created_at AS startDate, req.requested_due_date AS endDate, o.business_id AS businessId, o.customer_id AS customerId FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN bids b ON o.bid_id = b.bid_id JOIN request req ON b.request_id = req.request_id WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND o.customer_id = (SELECT customer_id FROM customer WHERE login_id = #{loginId})
